title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSE - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - NSE - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
NSE is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
